ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "mid" INTEGER /* Main item identifier (e.g., book ID) */,
  "miid" INTEGER /* Minor item identifier (e.g., edition ID) */,
  "nid" INTEGER /* Node identifier (e.g., section ID) */,
  "wid" INTEGER /* Work identifier (e.g., author ID) */,
  "location_code" TEXT /* Code representing the physical location of the item */,
  "location" INTEGER /* Numeric code for the location */,
  "barcode" TEXT /* Unique barcode assigned to the item */,
  "callnum" TEXT /* Call number for the item */,
  "dewey" INTEGER /* Dewey Decimal classification number */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item record was created */,
  "updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item record was last updated */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., book, DVD, audiobook) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the item (e.g., available, checked out, reserved) */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition details of the item */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the item */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre or category of the item */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the item */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN number for books */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_location_code FOREIGN KEY ("location_code") REFERENCES locations ("location_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_code" TEXT /* Code representing the physical location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "branch_manager" TEXT /* Name of the branch manager */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., librarian, admin, patron) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the item */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the item was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, check out, check in) */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual return date for checked-out items */,
  "fine_amount" TEXT /* Fine amount if the item is returned late */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)
